title: HeartPrefs
description: An open, portable, signed matching-intent document for agent-mediated matching. v0.1 (DRAFT). The matching vocabulary (self/seek/free) is the only invented surface; identity, attestation, consent and payment are thin envelopes that delegate to existing rails (DID/VC, AP2, x402). The same canonical bytes are intended to ride x402 bodies, A2A Agent-Card extensions, MCP resources, and ERC-8004 service entries.

kids.description: suggested vocab: none-want-none | none-want-some | none-unsure | have-want-more | have-done

seek.description: who and what the subject seeks; dealbreakers are HARD, ANDed filters

free.description: free-text. `desire` and `boundaries` are GATED keys: omitted from the public projection, served only after identity proof + payment.

identity.description: binding block 1 — who controls this document

subject.description: DID (did:pkh:eip155:<chain>:<addr> or did:web) of the signing key; MUST equal proof.verificationMethod

agentRegistry.description: optional CAIP-10 of the ERC-8004 IdentityRegistry

registrationUri.description: optional ERC-8004 registration file listing this doc as a service

attestation.description: binding block 2 — proof of adulthood by selective disclosure (no date of birth)

ageOver18.description: fast-filter summary; the credential is the source of truth

credential.description: a W3C Verifiable Presentation (VC Data Model 2.0) disclosing ONLY the ageOver18 predicate

consent.description: binding block 3 — standing/delegated access (choose ONE scheme)

payment.description: binding block 4 — an x402 PaymentRequirements quote to read/submit/subscribe (settlement happens out of band)

ext.description: permissionless extension bag; consumers MUST ignore unknown keys, never reject

proof.description: detached signature over RFC 8785 (JCS) canonicalization of the document with `proof.signature` removed
